summary: Iteration 42: Complete frontend testing of NEW Dashboard features - Period Filter Bar and Card-List Detail Panel. All features verified successfully. Period filter with 5 pills (Tout, Aujourd'hui, 7 jours, 30 jours, Personnalisé) working correctly. 'Tout' active by default (black background). 'Personnalisé' shows date inputs (DE/À) and result counter (43/44 résultats). Charts update dynamically when filter changes. DashboardDetail.jsx completely rewritten with Card-List format (no DataTable/Accordion). Cards display: photo thumbnail, name (bold), badges (Etat+Status+Famille+Tag), battery bar, map button. Search functionality filters cards in real-time with result counter. Engins and Tags pages working correctly (no regression).

minor.issue: Occasional 500 error on first KPI card click (resolved on retry) - same as iteration 41

issues: React warning: non-boolean attribute 'sortable' passed to DOM element
React warning: Each child in list should have unique 'key' prop (PrivateRoutes, SidebarMenuMain, ChatMessage)

passed_tests: TEST 1: Login with admin/user@1234 - successful redirect to /tagdashboard/index
TEST 2: Period filter bar visible (data-testid='om-period-filter')
TEST 3: 5 filter pills visible: Tout, Aujourd'hui, 7 jours, 30 jours, Personnalisé
TEST 4: 'Tout' pill active by default (black background, om-filter-pill--active)
TEST 5: Click 'Personnalisé' shows date inputs (DE and À fields)
TEST 6: Result counter visible: '43 / 44 résultats' when filter applied
TEST 7: Charts update dynamically - Total changed from 44 to 43 when Personnalisé filter applied
TEST 8: 4 KPI cards visible with values (11/4935, 12/53, 1/4935, 1/53)
TEST 9: KPI cards have colored icons, progress bars, percentage indicators (22%, 1%)
TEST 10: Activity feed 'Dernière Activité' with 12 items and status badges
TEST 11: Three charts visible (Répartition État donut, Distribution Statuts bar, Assets par Famille donut)
TEST 12: Alerts panel 'Assets nécessitant attention' with 2 alert rows
TEST 13: KPI card click opens detail panel with Card-List format (NOT DataTable)
TEST 14: Detail panel has title, search bar, close button (X)
TEST 15: Search bar placeholder: 'Rechercher un asset...'
TEST 16: Search result counter updates in real-time (e.g., '32 résultats' after search 'BC')
TEST 17: Tags libre detail: 41 cards with name (bold), badges (BLE, Disponible, Actif)
TEST 18: Engins detail (Liste engin au depôt): 2 cards with photo thumbnail, name, badges, battery bar, map button
TEST 19: Engin card elements: Etat badge (Entrée), Status badge (Livré/Réception), Famille badge (GR taille/Pt taille), Tag badge, Battery 0%, Map button, Location text
TEST 20: No DataTable found in detail panel (correct - using Card-List)
TEST 21: No Accordion found in detail panel (correct - using Card-List)
TEST 22: Close button (X) works correctly
TEST 23: Engins page - SaaS Premium header with blue gradient icon
TEST 24: Engins page - Title 'Engins', subtitle 'Gestion et suivi de vos assets', count '4935 assets'
TEST 25: Engins page - 10 Etat badges, 10 Status badges, 10 Battery widgets, 10 Famille chips
TEST 26: Tags page - SaaS Premium header with purple gradient icon
TEST 27: Tags page - Title 'Liste des tags', subtitle 'Inventaire et suivi de vos tags', count '53 tags'
TEST 28: Tags page - 10 Active badges, 10 Status badges, 10 Famille chips
critical_code_review_comments: DashboardListCards.jsx: Period filter bar correctly implemented with 5 pills (Tout, Aujourd'hui, 7 jours, 30 jours, Personnalisé)
DashboardListCards.jsx: filteredDetailData useMemo correctly filters allDetailData by date based on periodFilter state
DashboardListCards.jsx: Charts (ApexCharts) correctly depend on analytics which depends on filteredDetailData - dynamic updates working
DashboardListCards.jsx: Custom date range inputs (DE/À) appear when 'Personnalisé' selected
DashboardListCards.jsx: Result counter shows 'X / Y résultats' format when filter is not 'all'
DashboardDetail.jsx: COMPLETELY REWRITTEN - DataTable/Accordion replaced with Card-List format
DashboardDetail.jsx: EnginCard component displays: photo thumbnail, name (bold), badges (Etat+Status+Famille+Tag), battery bar, map button, location
DashboardDetail.jsx: TagCard component displays: icon placeholder, name (bold), badges (Famille+Status+Active)
DashboardDetail.jsx: Search bar with 'Rechercher un asset...' placeholder filters cards in real-time
All data-testid attributes correctly implemented for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 42 tested NEW Dashboard features: Period Filter Bar (5 pills) and Card-List Detail Panel. Period filter: Tout (default active), Aujourd'hui, 7 jours, 30 jours, Personnalisé (shows date inputs DE/À). Result counter format: 'X / Y résultats'. Charts update dynamically based on filter. DashboardDetail.jsx uses Card-List format (NOT DataTable): EnginCard (photo, name, badges, battery, map) and TagCard (icon, name, badges). Search filters cards in real-time. External API is slow (60+ seconds) - use long timeouts. Navigation via pushState after login.
